top_signals.title: Japan’s Nikkon Said to Weigh Going Private With US Funds to Bid
top_signals.summary: Nikkon Holdings Co. is considering going private and the Japanese logistics company is preparing to hold a first round of bidding in early June, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: M&S boss says supermarket price caps ‘completely preposterous’
top_signals.summary: The boss of M&S has dubbed government proposals to urge supermarkets to cap the prices of foods as “completely preposterous”.  Stuart Machin, chief executive of the retail giant, called on the government to cut red tape and taxes on grocers instead of pressuring supermarkets to cut prices. The Treasury has reportedly been asking supermarkets to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
